tasks.label: Boot current file (Make)
tasks.command: docker run --rm -v $PWD:/work -w /work -u root ghcr.io/pedropcventura/riscv-dev_tools:dev-amd64-final bash -c "make build FILE='src/${fileBasename}' ARCH='-march=rv32im -mabi=ilp32'" && cd ${workspaceFolder}/L2IP/hw && quartus_pgm -m JTAG -o 'p;output_files/L2IP.sof' && sleep 2 && quartus_stp -t ${workspaceFolder}/L2IP/sw/tools/atualizaMemoria.tcl ${workspaceFolder}/L2IP/sw/build/firmware_rom.mif ROM 0
